page_content:
HIST398 Honors Thesis Directed Study (2 Credits)

Individual research and preparation of History Honors Theses. Prerequisite: HIST395 and HIST396.

Corequisite: HIST399.

Restriction: Must be in History Honors program.

Repeatable to: 4 credits if content differs.

Additional Information: This course must be taken twice to fulfill the requirements for the honors program in history.
